title: Passive Charms
description: Golden disks imbued with magic to support and protect the holder.
body:
Craft Charms, golden disks imbued with magic to support and protect the holder.

 

**Maintenance Charms** search your inventory for damaged items, mending cracks and sharpening tips. If they find nothing else to repair, they turn inwards to refuel themselves for future use.

 

**Industry Charms** search your inventory for unprocessed goods, burning away impurities and melting down trash. They are aggressive, but will not consume enchanted, named, or equipped items.

 

**Contingency Charms** watch for their appointed time, and when the time is right release whatever power you have stored within them. With 6 possible triggers and 6 possible effects, they are highly customizable.
